topics.title: Unity IL2CPP
topics.explanation:
IL2CPP converts Unity scripts to C++ then native code. Analysis workflow:
1. Locate global-metadata.dat and GameAssembly.dll
2. Use Il2CppDumper for types/methods
3. Load script.json in Ghidra/IDA
4. Map managed names to native functions
learningPath: Read the overview and core concepts for Unity IL2CPP
Study official documentation and recommended articles
Complete hands-on exercises in a controlled lab environment
Apply knowledge to a simple open-source game target
Document findings and review prerequisites for advanced topics
exercises: Write a summary explaining Unity IL2CPP in your own words
Create a diagram mapping key concepts and relationships
Complete one guided lab exercise related to this topic

topics.title: Unity Mono
topics.explanation:
Mono builds embed metadata in Assembly-CSharp.dll. Tools: dnSpy, ILSpy, CE Mono dissect.

Easier than IL2CPP — managed code can be decompiled to readable C#.

topics.title: Unity Asset Extraction
topics.explanation:
Assets in sharedassets*.assets, bundles. Tools: AssetStudio, UABE.

Useful for understanding game data structures, textures, prefab hierarchies.

topics.title: Unreal UObject System
topics.explanation:
All Unreal objects inherit UObject. GNames/GObjects arrays locate class info. UProperty system describes fields.

SDK generators parse these arrays for typed offsets.

topics.title: Unreal SDK Generation
topics.explanation:
Workflow: dump GNames/GObjects → parse with dumper → generate C++ headers with offsets.

Understand padding, inheritance, and property types for accurate layouts.

topics.title: Unreal Blueprints
topics.explanation: Blueprints compile to bytecode executed by UE VM. Harder to analyze than C++ but strings and UFunction names help locate logic.

topics.title: Source Engine Entity System
topics.explanation:
Source uses CBaseEntity hierarchy. Datamaps describe networked fields. Netvar dumps via interfaces reveal offsets.

Practice on CS:GO/TF2 open SDK references.

topics.title: Source Engine Networking
topics.description: Net channels, prediction, and lag compensation.
topics.explanation:
Source networking: server authority, client prediction, interpolation. Study net_graph, cl_showpos for understanding.

Focus on protocol analysis for security research.
